title: Implementing measures to improve Build Out transparencyвЂ‹: вЂ‹Technical consultation
body: "вЂ‹вЂ‹This technical consultation sets out the rationale for implementing the new statutory build out information requirements and the power to decline to determine applications, including setting out the importance of build out and the governmentвЂ™s plan to improve build out transparency. It then goes into details of how the provisions are proposed to be applied, seeking specific views on: В    вЂ‹the type of development these build out measures will apply toВ  вЂ‹introducing and implementing build out statementsВ  вЂ‹implementing commencement noticesВ  вЂ‹implementing development progress reportsВ  вЂ‹sites where multiple developers are involved in build outВ  implementing the power to decline to determine applicationsВ  вЂ‹potential impacts of the proposed measuresвЂ‹  "
